Lumify
Table of Contents

Class ChatMessage

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A single chat message in a room. Persisted by ChatHub and read back via ChatController. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class ChatMessage
Inheritance
object
ChatMessage

Properties

Content

The message text.

public string Content { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

RoomID

The chat room (SignalR group) this message belongs to.

public string RoomID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Sender

The sending user.

public virtual User Sender { get; set; }

Property Value

User

SenderID

The user who sent the message.

public string SenderID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

UpdatedAt

Last-update timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string UpdatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string
